SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class ParkDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.ParkDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ParkDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable data transfer object representing a park row.

Created server-side by ParkDAO and serialized across the socket to the client inside a ServerResponse — e.g. to populate the booking park dropdown (RequestType.LIST_PARKS) or to show a park manager their park's current parameters (RequestType.GET_PARK).

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ParkDTO

      public ParkDTO(int id, String name, int maxCapacity, int gapSize, int defaultStayMinutes, int specialDiscountPercent, Integer managerId)
      Creates a fully populated park.
      Parameters:
      id - unique park identifier
      name - display name of the park
      maxCapacity - maximum visitor capacity
      gapSize - reserved capacity buffer
      defaultStayMinutes - default visit length in minutes
      specialDiscountPercent - additional special-sale discount percent
      managerId - identifier of the park manager, or null if none
